title: 「As long as」條件句
titleEn: Using as long as to state a condition

source.file: Sentence Stucture 59 -「As long as 句——表達條件」.pdf

formula: Main clause + as long as + subject + verb + other information

formulas.formula: Main clause + as long as + subject + verb + other information
As long as + subject + verb + other information, + main clause

example: I am satisfied with my life as long as I am doing what I truly enjoy.
exampleZh: 只要我正在做自己真正喜歡的事，我就對人生感到滿足。

examples.en: I am satisfied with my life as long as I am doing what I truly enjoy.
examples.zh: 只要我正在做自己真正喜歡的事，我就對人生感到滿足。
examples.highlight: as long as I am doing what I truly enjoy

meaning.zh: As long as 說明某個行動、許可、結果或情況成立所必須符合的條件，意思接近 if、provided that 或「只要」。

rules.en: As long as introduces a required condition.
rules.zh: As long as 表示需要符合的條件，意思接近 if、provided that 或 on condition that。
examples: You can use my laptop as long as you are careful.

rules.en: Use a present tense in the condition clause for future meaning.
rules.zh: 談論未來時，as long as 條件子句一般使用現在式。
examples: You can go out as long as you finish your homework.

rules.en: The condition clause may come first or last.
rules.zh: As long as 子句可以放在句首或句尾；放在句首時，後面使用逗號。
examples: As long as everyone is ready, we can begin.

rules.en: The condition may be affirmative or negative.
rules.zh: 條件可以是肯定或否定。
examples: You may take photographs as long as you do not use flash.

rules.en: This lesson does not practise the duration meaning of as long as.
rules.zh: 本課不練習 as long as 表示長度或整段時間的意思。
examples: The bridge is as long as the road.

benefits.zh: 它能清楚說明某事獲准、可行或可接受所需的條件。

benefits.en: It joins permission and a requirement in one sentence.
benefits.zh: 它把可以做甚麼和必須符合的要求直接連接起來。

benefits.en: It focuses attention on what really matters.
benefits.zh: 當其他細節有彈性時，它能突出真正重要的條件。

benefits.en: It makes rules and agreements sound more cooperative.
benefits.zh: 它通常先說明可做的事情，再提出條件，使規則較正面和有商量空間。

benefits.en: It gives another way to organise a sentence.
benefits.zh: 把條件放在句首可增加句式變化並先交代重要前提。

en: Rewrite each sentence using as long as to show the condition.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 as long as 改寫以下句子，以表達條件。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: If you return my pen after class, you can borrow it.
questions.promptZh: 如果你在下課後歸還我的筆，你便可以借用它。
questions.answer: You can borrow my pen as long as you return it after class.
questions.answerZh: 只要你在下課後歸還我的筆，你便可以借用它。
questions.highlight: You can borrow my pen as long as you return it after class.

questions.prompt: I am happy to help, provided that you tell me what you need.
questions.promptZh: 我很樂意幫忙，前提是你告訴我你需要甚麼。
questions.answer: I am happy to help as long as you tell me what you need.
questions.answerZh: 只要你告訴我你需要甚麼，我便很樂意幫忙。
questions.highlight: I am happy to help as long as you tell me what you need.

questions.prompt: Mia may play outside only if she finishes her homework first.
questions.promptZh: 米婭只有先完成功課，才可以到外面玩。
questions.answer: Mia may play outside as long as she finishes her homework first.
questions.answerZh: 只要米婭先完成功課，她便可以到外面玩。
questions.highlight: Mia may play outside as long as she finishes her homework first.

questions.prompt: We can have dinner in the garden unless it rains.
questions.promptZh: 除非下雨，否則我們可以在花園吃晚飯。
questions.answer: We can have dinner in the garden as long as it does not rain.
questions.answerZh: 只要不下雨，我們便可以在花園吃晚飯。
questions.highlight: We can have dinner in the garden as long as it does not rain.

questions.prompt: Ben may use the computer. The condition is that he must ask his parents first.
questions.promptZh: 本可以使用電腦。條件是他必須先問父母。
questions.answer: Ben may use the computer as long as he asks his parents first.
questions.answerZh: 只要本先問父母，他便可以使用電腦。
questions.highlight: Ben may use the computer as long as he asks his parents first.

questions.prompt: The dog may stay indoors on condition that it remains quiet.
questions.promptZh: 這隻狗可以留在室內，條件是牠保持安靜。
questions.answer: The dog may stay indoors as long as it remains quiet.
questions.answerZh: 只要這隻狗保持安靜，牠便可以留在室內。
questions.highlight: The dog may stay indoors as long as it remains quiet.

questions.prompt: I do not mind which restaurant we choose. I only want the food to be fresh.
questions.promptZh: 我不介意我們選擇哪間餐廳。我只希望食物新鮮。
questions.answer: I do not mind which restaurant we choose as long as the food is fresh.
questions.answerZh: 只要食物新鮮，我不介意我們選擇哪間餐廳。
questions.highlight: I do not mind which restaurant we choose as long as the food is fresh.

questions.prompt: If you leave now, you will catch the bus.
questions.promptZh: 如果你現在離開，你便能趕上巴士。
questions.answer: You will catch the bus as long as you leave now.
questions.answerZh: 只要你現在離開，你便能趕上巴士。
questions.highlight: You will catch the bus as long as you leave now.

questions.prompt: Can Emma join the game? Yes, but she must follow the rules.
questions.promptZh: 艾瑪可以參加遊戲嗎？可以，但她必須遵守規則。
questions.answer: Emma can join the game as long as she follows the rules.
questions.answerZh: 只要艾瑪遵守規則，她便可以參加遊戲。
questions.highlight: Emma can join the game as long as she follows the rules.

questions.prompt: Everyone must be ready before we can begin the lesson.
questions.promptZh: 所有人都必須準備好，我們才可以開始上課。
questions.answer: As long as everyone is ready, we can begin the lesson.
questions.answerZh: 只要所有人都準備好，我們便可以開始上課。
questions.highlight: As long as everyone is ready, we can begin the lesson.

questions.prompt: The picnic can continue, but the weather must stay dry.
questions.promptZh: 野餐可以繼續，但天氣必須保持乾爽。
questions.answer: The picnic can continue as long as the weather stays dry.
questions.answerZh: 只要天氣保持乾爽，野餐便可以繼續。
questions.highlight: The picnic can continue as long as the weather stays dry.

questions.prompt: I will lend you the book only if you keep it clean.
questions.promptZh: 只有你保持這本書整潔，我才會把它借給你。
questions.answer: I will lend you the book as long as you keep it clean.
questions.answerZh: 只要你保持這本書整潔，我便會把它借給你。

questions.answer: Sarah may attend the concert as long as an adult goes with her.

questions.prompt: If you save your work regularly, you will not lose much if the computer stops.
questions.promptZh: 如果你定期儲存工作，即使電腦停止運作，你也不會損失太多內容。
questions.answer: As long as you save your work regularly, you will not lose much if the computer stops.

questions.highlight: As long as you save your work regularly, you will not lose much if the computer stops.

questions.prompt: The shop will replace the item provided that you keep the receipt.

questions.answer: The shop will replace the item as long as you keep the receipt.
questions.answerZh: 只要你保留收據，商店便會更換該件貨品。

questions.prompt: The class can use the sports hall unless another group has booked it.

questions.prompt: We can end the meeting early if we cover all the important points.
questions.promptZh: 如果我們討論完所有重點，便可以提早結束會議。
questions.answer: We can end the meeting early as long as we cover all the important points.

questions.answer: Olivia can work from home as long as she attends the morning video call.

questions.answer: As long as the batteries are charged, this torch will work during a power cut.

questions.prompt: Visitors may take photographs in the museum on condition that they do not use flash.

questions.answer: Visitors may take photographs in the museum as long as they do not use flash.

questions.prompt: You can update the programme safely provided that you back up the files first.

questions.answer: The town can welcome more visitors as long as local services can handle the extra demand.
questions.answerZh: 只要本地服務能應付額外需求，這個城鎮便可以接待更多訪客。
questions.highlight: The town can welcome more visitors as long as local services can handle the extra demand.

questions.promptZh: 我們可以簡化申請表，條件是仍能收集所有必要資料。
questions.answer: We can simplify the application form as long as all necessary information is still collected.
questions.answerZh: 只要仍能收集所有必要資料，我們便可以簡化申請表。

questions.prompt: People may accept the final decision if the committee explains its reasons clearly.
questions.promptZh: 如果委員會清楚解釋理由，人們或會接受最終決定。
questions.answer: As long as the committee explains its reasons clearly, people may accept the final decision.
questions.answerZh: 只要委員會清楚解釋理由，人們或會接受最終決定。
questions.highlight: As long as the committee explains its reasons clearly, people may accept the final decision.

questions.prompt: The school is willing to let students use tablets in class. The condition is that they use them only for learning.
questions.promptZh: 學校願意讓學生在課堂上使用平板電腦。條件是學生只把它們用於學習。
questions.answer: The school is willing to let students use tablets in class as long as they use them only for learning.
questions.answerZh: 只要學生只把平板電腦用於學習，學校便願意讓他們在課堂上使用。
questions.highlight: The school is willing to let students use tablets in class as long as they use them only for learning.

questions.prompt: I do not mind whether the presentation is online or face to face. Everyone must be able to take part.
questions.promptZh: 我不介意簡報以網上或面對面形式進行。所有人都必須能夠參與。
questions.answer: I do not mind whether the presentation is online or face to face as long as everyone can take part.
questions.answerZh: 只要所有人都能夠參與，我不介意簡報以網上或面對面形式進行。

questions.promptZh: 前提是新巴士路線覆蓋主要住宅區，它便不需要在每條街道停站。

questions.answerZh: 只要新巴士路線覆蓋主要住宅區，它便不需要在每條街道停站。

questions.highlight: The organisation may continue the project as long as it can show that the benefits are greater than the costs.

questions.prompt: The new system can be introduced without interrupting daily services. The essential condition is that the team responds quickly to problems.
questions.promptZh: 新系統可以在不中斷日常服務的情況下推出。必要條件是團隊迅速處理問題。
questions.answer: As long as the team responds quickly to problems, the new system can be introduced without interrupting daily services.
questions.answerZh: 只要團隊迅速處理問題，新系統便可以在不中斷日常服務的情況下推出。
questions.highlight: As long as the team responds quickly to problems, the new system can be introduced without interrupting daily services.
